name: psy-core
description: Tamper-evident audit adapter for OpenClaw memory and skill access.

actorId.description: Required audit actor id unless allowAnonymous is true.

tenantId.description: Optional tenant id attached to every audit event.

purpose.description: Optional purpose string attached to every audit event.

dbPath.description: Path to the psy audit SQLite database.

sealKeyPath.description: Path to the HMAC seal key.

psyCoreVersion.description: Deprecated compatibility field. The plugin writes audit records in-process and does not use npx.

psyBinary.description: Deprecated compatibility field. The plugin no longer shells out to a psy binary.

payloadCapture.description: Capture redacted payload previews. Off by default to avoid storing memory text.

dryRun.description: Log envelopes instead of writing them to the psy audit store.

allowAnonymous.description: Allow startup without actorId. Not recommended for production.
